TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == O nengneng to ilisin (3) == Kailisinan ira ko "pakomodan". To'as ilisin no niyaro' no 'Amis i, ira ko masiikeday to pakomodan, pililafangan ato pipihayan. Sakacecay romi'ad to dadaya midemak to "pakomodan" a ilisin, ikor to pina romi'ad midemak to pililafang ato pipihayan. O tatenokan no ilisin ko "pililafangan", caay ka dengan o finawlan, halo o komodan a kawas ato lafang, malakapot a romadiw, makero, miepah, mi'icep, maainiini a matatawatawa, malipahak toya romi'ad. O "pipihayan" o kakomodan no niyaro' mifetir/mifetik, o fafahiyan no niyaro' ko romadiway a masakero (caay pikihatiya ko fa'inayan), misera to komodan a kawas ato lafalafang. O katadamaan no "pikomodan" matiya pidemak to "pisacepo'" a lisin, mateli i sapad ko toron, 'icep, fila' ato epah. Mi'inip ko kakomodan no niyaro' to epah, itiya pasifafaed micolipes, padoedo o kakomodan ato kakitaan no niyaro' romadiw to sapikomod a radiw, mihamham to piraod no kakomodan a kawas i kailisinan a demak. toya pikomodan dengan o fa'inayan ko malikowatay masakero, fafahiyan ato kaemangay miki'araw i lawac, nika caay ka nga'ay micomod i laloma', matefocaw no kawas. Caayay ka tadamaan a pikomodan, nika midemak ko kakomodan no niyaro' mifetir/mifetik itiya i, miceno' ko talodo' to epah, pasifafaed mifetir/mifetik manga'ay to. Nanoya kakomodan ato kakitaan no niyaro romadiw to sapikomod a radiw, mitahidang mihamham to komodan a kawas a mikihatiya to ilisin. "Pikomodan", so'elinen i o "palatadamaan a lisin", orasaka o sasowalen no 'Amis to ilisin, "itiniay i cilisinay", patodongan noni o pahanhanan no niyaro', micomod i "salaloma'an no tadamaanay no ilisin", o midoedo to nitelekan i lisin a ma'orip, midemak, sakaeca ka demak ko sakalatiih a cilafo. Paherek to ko ilisin, midemak ko kakomodan no niyaro' to "piihayan" a mifetir/mifetik, todong "piselong to tadamanay no lisin", o finawlan itini i "piselong to tadamaanay lisin", mapatiko tayra i ka'oripan to romi'ami'ad. Orasaka katimolay 'Amis (Posong) kiloma'an han ko ilisin, "Ilaloma'ay" sanay. Roma pahapinang to "laloma'anay a kadademak, caay ko kalingadan; nika ira ko talolongay harateng sakiilisin, micomod ko tamdaw i laloma' no "tadamaanay lisin a romi'ad". O maanan koya "tadamaanay lisin a romi'ad"? nawhani oya tadamaanay kawas mikihatiyaay to i salaloma'an no ilisin a demak, o tamdamdaw midoedo to lisin a demak. cimaay koya nitahidangan a kawas i kailisinan? Onini a kawakawas o sowal no 'Amis o kawas saan. I 1986 miheca Taywan sisyo yofayof pasadak to "O pidafohan to sowal no 'Amis" misaheci ti kawas: (1) Wama a kawas, (2)kawakawa, 'adingo/salo'afang, mitifacay to tataparan a iraay, (3)kawas/palafoay. So'elinen ko sowal masasifed ko harateng no 'Amis to saki kawas, nika manga'ay sasiikeden o "i saseraay kawas" ato "kakarayan a kawas" a tosa. O i saseraay a kawas, halo tekedan 'adingo, 'a'adopen 'adingo, malengaway 'adingo, milafoay 'adingo (tatiihay salo'afang, mirarakatay salo'afang), tofotofo, tekateka, lalooc kawas, maciwciw, 'orad, sara, lonen/'atoray. "kakarayan a kawas" halo malataw, cilocidal, folad, to'as a kawas (nga'ayay salo'afang, talakakarayan), kawas no cikawasay. Orasaka, "pakomodan" no ilisin, caay ko pitahidang to kawas no to'as a lisin, mitahidangay to ikakarayanay isaseraay a kawakawasan. Kahacecay laloma'an no 'Amis awaay ko "pakawasan", orasaka awaay ko pita'ong to to'asan a kaas a lisin. Ira ko papinapina kapah no 'Amis misalongoc to "pita'ongan to to'as" i kailisinan, kahinapecen ako ko matiniay, matiniay a "pikomodan" masaromotay ko kafana'anto "to'as a lisin"? ano eca mafiyolay to no Payrang to pipatireng to "pakawasan" hakiya? Itini "pipakomodan" ano eca i "pipihayan" to, mikomoday no niyaro' citodong to pifetir/pifetik, o todong no "salong no kacipinangan". Matiya o pihamham no miso to picomod no tao i loma' iso, paciro' to kamay (kawanan/kawili) a mikawih, todong no faloco' iso. Kacitodongan ko pikawih, pahapinang to pihamham no faloco'. O patodongan aca ko pikawih, nika awaay ko kaci'icel nira. Tatiih matira ko sowal iso: nawhani ira ko pikawih nira, saka mato ci'iecelay kako, comod comod sa toya a loma'. Ira ko matiniay a demak haw? Awaayto. Itini i kasasiromaroma no pitooran i, o todong no lisin o "salong no kacipinangan", pakayni toni a salong no kacipinangan, pahapinang no faloco' mangodo to saki kawas. Orasaka, o foksi ko mitolonay to pitekaan no ilisin i, oya caayay ko mitooray a tamdaw aka a kasomowal: Aya, macalap/ma'awid to no Kristokiw a Kawas konini, saka caayto ka pikihatiya tonini a ilisin. Malecad to, ano o mikomoday no niyaro' ko mifetiray/mifetikay to pitekaan no ilisin i, oya mitooray a tamdaw caayka pasowal: Aya, macalap/ma'awid to no cikawas palafoay konini, mapaoning to, saka caayto ka pikihatiya kako tonini a ilisin. Ano o ci'icelay ko pifetir/pifetik i, ciepocay koya mitahidangan a kawas i picomod i kailisinan hakiya? Pakayni i pipihayan misera a pifetir/pifetik ira ko "epoc"? o pikawih no tamdaw a micomod, oya pifahfah no tamdaw i sooy sa koya kawas, ano matira o tamdaw ko mi'emetay ari? O ningkiw no tamdaw matiya! O pifetir/pifetik no tamdamdaw, ikaka ko no kakomodan no niyaro' ano eca no cikawasay ko kaci'icel haw? Caayto! O cecay no paso'elinay dengan cecay ko Kawas ya sanay a mitooray, matalaw aca to "picering no tamdaw" a kawasan, caay piingir to kalikowatan no ilisin, tona pakatengil to kawas no ilisin caay sato paterep ko kamirmir, maaro'ay no palafoay hakiya? Na talacowaay to ko nano nipaso'elinan saw? O pitolon no foksi o sapifalic aca to papotal no ilisin, nika caay kafalic ko tatodong i salaloma'an no ilisin. Masowalay to ako: pitekaan no lisin/pa'edaw nai pipalomaan to hapay/lamelo, caay to pipaloma kita to hafay/lamelo i, nika midotoc haca kita midemak to ilisin; tayra to kita i tokay, caay to kaliomah, awaay to pilitodan, nika midotoc ho kita midemak to ilisin; malingad kita i tokay, caay ka cakat ko kinaira, nika midemak haca to ilisin, nawhani o ilisin caay to ko pihemak to pilitodan, o pahapinang to piahowid/aray to kawas. O nano masamsamay, mapa'ekelay no "palafoay tatiihay" ko tato'asan no 'Amis finacadan, talacowa misa'icel i masamaamaanay to sapiliyang a mico'ay, cimalasawadayto ko 'orip, hato caay ka lifet ko mipa'ekelay. Nanoya dengan to piti'er to sini'ada no kawas, pa'araw to pakayraan a miliyang, itiya a malowid ko tatiihay, pakaliyas to ko finawlan to katalawan a cipakoniraay. Mahaen to kita anini, itini i tatiihay a ka'oripan, o midotocay to pidipot no kawas titaanan, saka ira kita i matini, orasaka pakayni tonini ko sapidemak ita to ilisin, o nian ko pahecian ato kacitodongan no "Ilisin" hananay. Talacowa mafalic to ko papotal no ponka, nika salaloma'an no ponka caayto kafalic, o nian koya miredoan no mita a tatodong ato laloma'an no ponka. Itini i kasaniyaro'aro' a finawlan saheto to o mitooray to Kristokiw, Tingsokiw, Sinyaso ano eca roma pakayraan, anini o tolon ko pitekaan no ilisin o nga'ayay, awaay ko kafalic no tatodong no ilisin. Nika dengan o pidemak no sifo ano eca sician tamdaw a nicikerohan a ilisin ko so'elinay mafalic, mawiletay ko tatodong salaloma'an a ilisin, nawhani matiniay a ilisin o saki'arawan, pikiki aca, pilietanan no makeroay, caayay ko sakipiahowid/piaray to kawas ko nikeroan. Orasaka o kapah no 'Amis o mamiliyang to mikikiay ko pahecian a ilisin ko matatodongay. Mitiliday ci Cilo singsi (2018/8/1) ==== Mifalicay ci Masao Nikar ====
S.PHON: == o~u nəŋnəŋ to~u iɾisin (*) == kaiɾisinan ira ko~u "pako~umo~uɬ~ɮan". to~uʡas iɾisin no~u nijaro~uʡ no~u ʡamis i, ira ko~u masiikəɬ~ɮaj to~u pako~umo~uɬ~ɮan, piɾiɾafaŋan ato~u pipiħajan. sakaʦəʦaj ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ to~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaja miɬ~ɮəmak to~u "pako~umo~uɬ~ɮan" a iɾisin, iko~ur to~u pina ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ miɬ~ɮəmak to~u piɾiɾafaŋ ato~u pipiħajan. o~u tatəno~ukan no~u iɾisin ko~u "piɾiɾafaŋan", ʦaaj ka ɬ~ɮəŋan o~u finawɾan, ħaɾo~u o~u ko~umo~uɬ~ɮan a kawas ato~u ɾafaŋ, maɾakapo~ut a ro~umaɬ~ɮiw, makəro~u, miəpaħ, miʡiʦəp, maainiini a matatawatawa, maɾipaħak to~uja ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ. o~u "pipiħajan" o~u kako~umo~uɬ~ɮan no~u nijaro~uʡ mifətir/mifətik, o~u fafaħijan no~u nijaro~uʡ ko~u ro~umaɬ~ɮiwaj a masakəro~u (ʦaaj pikiħatija ko~u faʡinajan), misəra to~u ko~umo~uɬ~ɮan a kawas ato~u ɾafaɾafaŋ. o~u kataɬ~ɮamaan no~u "piko~umo~uɬ~ɮan" matija piɬ~ɮəmak to~u "pisaʦəpo~uʡ" a ɾisin, matəɾi i sapaɬ~ɮ ko~u to~uro~un, ʡiʦəp, fiɾaʡ ato~u əpaħ. miʡinip ko~u kako~umo~uɬ~ɮan no~u nijaro~uʡ to~u əpaħ, itija pasifafaəɬ~ɮ miʦo~uɾipəs, paɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u o~u kako~umo~uɬ~ɮan ato~u kakitaan no~u nijaro~uʡ ro~umaɬ~ɮiw to~u sapiko~umo~uɬ~ɮ a raɬ~ɮiw, miħamħam to~u pirao~uɬ~ɮ no~u kako~umo~uɬ~ɮan a kawas i kaiɾisinan a ɬ~ɮəmak. to~uja piko~umo~uɬ~ɮan ɬ~ɮəŋan o~u faʡinajan ko~u maɾiko~uwataj masakəro~u, fafaħijan ato~u kaəmaŋaj mikiʡaraw i ɾawaʦ, nika ʦaaj ka ŋaʡaj miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ i ɾaɾo~umaʡ, matəfo~uʦaw no~u kawas. ʦaajaj ka taɬ~ɮamaan a piko~umo~uɬ~ɮan, nika miɬ~ɮəmak ko~u kako~umo~uɬ~ɮan no~u nijaro~uʡ mifətir/mifətik itija i, miʦəno~uʡ ko~u taɾo~uɬ~ɮo~uʡ to~u əpaħ, pasifafaəɬ~ɮ mifətir/mifətik maŋaʡaj to~u. nano~uja kako~umo~uɬ~ɮan ato~u kakitaan no~u nijaro~u ro~umaɬ~ɮiw to~u sapiko~umo~uɬ~ɮ a raɬ~ɮiw, mitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ miħamħam to~u ko~umo~uɬ~ɮan a kawas a mikiħatija to~u iɾisin. "piko~umo~uɬ~ɮan", so~uʡəɾinən i o~u "paɾataɬ~ɮamaan a ɾisin", o~urasaka o~u saso~uwaɾən no~u ʡamis to~u iɾisin, "itiniaj i ʦiɾisinaj", pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋan no~uni o~u paħanħanan no~u nijaro~uʡ, miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ i "saɾaɾo~umaʡan no~u taɬ~ɮamaanaj no~u iɾisin", o~u miɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u to~u nitəɾəkan i ɾisin a maʡo~urip, miɬ~ɮəmak, sakaəʦa ka ɬ~ɮəmak ko~u sakaɾatiiħ a ʦiɾafo~u. paħərək to~u ko~u iɾisin, miɬ~ɮəmak ko~u kako~umo~uɬ~ɮan no~u nijaro~uʡ to~u "piiħajan" a mifətir/mifətik, to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ "pisəɾo~uŋ to~u taɬ~ɮamanaj no~u ɾisin", o~u finawɾan itini i "pisəɾo~uŋ to~u taɬ~ɮamaanaj ɾisin", mapatiko~u tajra i kaʡo~uripan to~u ro~umiʡamiʡaɬ~ɮ. o~urasaka katimo~uɾaj ʡamis (po~uso~uŋ) kiɾo~umaʡan ħan ko~u iɾisin, "iɾaɾo~umaʡaj" sanaj. ro~uma paħapinaŋ to~u "ɾaɾo~umaʡanaj a kaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmak, ʦaaj ko~u kaɾiŋaɬ~ɮan; nika ira ko~u taɾo~uɾo~uŋaj ħaratəŋ sakiiɾisin, miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw i ɾaɾo~umaʡ no~u "taɬ~ɮamaanaj ɾisin a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ". o~u maanan ko~uja "taɬ~ɮamaanaj ɾisin a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ"? nawħani o~uja taɬ~ɮamaanaj kawas mikiħatijaaj to~u i saɾaɾo~umaʡan no~u iɾisin a ɬ~ɮəmak, o~u tamɬ~ɮamɬ~ɮaw miɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u to~u ɾisin a ɬ~ɮəmak. ʦimaaj ko~uja nitaħiɬ~ɮaŋan a kawas i kaiɾisinan? o~unini a kawakawas o~u so~uwaɾ no~u ʡamis o~u kawas saan. i **** miħəʦa tajwan sisjo~u jo~ufajo~uf pasaɬ~ɮak to~u "o~u piɬ~ɮafo~uħan to~u so~uwaɾ no~u ʡamis" misaħəʦi ti kawas: (*) wama a kawas, (*)kawakawa, ʡaɬ~ɮiŋo~u/saɾo~uʡafaŋ, mitifaʦaj to~u tataparan a iraaj, (*)kawas/paɾafo~uaj. so~uʡəɾinən ko~u so~uwaɾ masasifəɬ~ɮ ko~u ħaratəŋ no~u ʡamis to~u saki kawas, nika maŋaʡaj sasiikəɬ~ɮən o~u "i sasəraaj kawas" ato~u "kakarajan a kawas" a to~usa. o~u i sasəraaj a kawas, ħaɾo~u təkəɬ~ɮan ʡaɬ~ɮiŋo~u, ʡaʡaɬ~ɮo~upən ʡaɬ~ɮiŋo~u, maɾəŋawaj ʡaɬ~ɮiŋo~u, miɾafo~uaj ʡaɬ~ɮiŋo~u (tatiiħaj saɾo~uʡafaŋ, mirarakataj saɾo~uʡafaŋ), to~ufo~uto~ufo~u, təkatəka, ɾaɾo~uo~uʦ kawas, maʦiwʦiw, ʡo~uraɬ~ɮ, sara, ɾo~unən/ʡato~uraj. "kakarajan a kawas" ħaɾo~u maɾataw, ʦiɾo~uʦiɬ~ɮaɾ, fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, to~uʡas a kawas (ŋaʡajaj saɾo~uʡafaŋ, taɾakakarajan), kawas no~u ʦikawasaj. o~urasaka, "pako~umo~uɬ~ɮan" no~u iɾisin, ʦaaj ko~u pitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ to~u kawas no~u to~uʡas a ɾisin, mitaħiɬ~ɮaŋaj to~u ikakarajanaj isasəraaj a kawakawasan. kaħaʦəʦaj ɾaɾo~umaʡan no~u ʡamis awaaj ko~u "pakawasan", o~urasaka awaaj ko~u pitaʡo~uŋ to~u to~uʡasan a kaas a ɾisin. ira ko~u papinapina kapaħ no~u ʡamis misaɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u "pitaʡo~uŋan to~u to~uʡas" i kaiɾisinan, kaħinapəʦən ako~u ko~u matiniaj, matiniaj a "piko~umo~uɬ~ɮan" masaro~umo~utaj ko~u kafanaʡanto~u "to~uʡas a ɾisin"? ano~u əʦa mafijo~uɾaj to~u no~u pajraŋ to~u pipatirəŋ to~u "pakawasan" ħakija? itini "pipako~umo~uɬ~ɮan" ano~u əʦa i "pipiħajan" to~u, miko~umo~uɬ~ɮaj no~u nijaro~uʡ ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u pifətir/pifətik, o~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u "saɾo~uŋ no~u kaʦipinaŋan". matija o~u piħamħam no~u miso~u to~u piʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ no~u tao~u i ɾo~umaʡ iso~u, paʦiro~uʡ to~u kamaj (kawanan/kawiɾi) a mikawiħ, to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ iso~u. kaʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋan ko~u pikawiħ, paħapinaŋ to~u piħamħam no~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ. o~u pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋan aʦa ko~u pikawiħ, nika awaaj ko~u kaʦiʡiʦəɾ nira. tatiiħ matira ko~u so~uwaɾ iso~u: nawħani ira ko~u pikawiħ nira, saka mato~u ʦiʡiəʦəɾaj kako~u, ʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ ʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ sa to~uja a ɾo~umaʡ. ira ko~u matiniaj a ɬ~ɮəmak ħaw? awaajto~u. itini i kasasiro~umaro~uma no~u pito~uo~uran i, o~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u ɾisin o~u "saɾo~uŋ no~u kaʦipinaŋan", pakajni to~uni a saɾo~uŋ no~u kaʦipinaŋan, paħapinaŋ no~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ maŋo~uɬ~ɮo~u to~u saki kawas. o~urasaka, o~u fo~uksi ko~u mito~uɾo~unaj to~u pitəkaan no~u iɾisin i, o~uja ʦaajaj ko~u mito~uo~uraj a tamɬ~ɮaw aka a kaso~umo~uwaɾ: aja, maʦaɾap/maʡawiɬ~ɮ to~u no~u kristo~ukiw a kawas ko~unini, saka ʦaajto~u ka pikiħatija to~unini a iɾisin. maɾəʦaɬ~ɮ to~u, ano~u o~u miko~umo~uɬ~ɮaj no~u nijaro~uʡ ko~u mifətiraj/mifətikaj to~u pitəkaan no~u iɾisin i, o~uja mito~uo~uraj a tamɬ~ɮaw ʦaajka paso~uwaɾ: aja, maʦaɾap/maʡawiɬ~ɮ to~u no~u ʦikawas paɾafo~uaj ko~unini, mapao~uniŋ to~u, saka ʦaajto~u ka pikiħatija kako~u to~unini a iɾisin. ano~u o~u ʦiʡiʦəɾaj ko~u pifətir/pifətik i, ʦiəpo~uʦaj ko~uja mitaħiɬ~ɮaŋan a kawas i piʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ i kaiɾisinan ħakija? pakajni i pipiħajan misəra a pifətir/pifətik ira ko~u "əpo~uʦ"? o~u pikawiħ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw a miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ, o~uja pifaħfaħ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw i so~uo~uj sa ko~uja kawas, ano~u matira o~u tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u miʡəmətaj ari? o~u niŋkiw no~u tamɬ~ɮaw matija! o~u pifətir/pifətik no~u tamɬ~ɮamɬ~ɮaw, ikaka ko~u no~u kako~umo~uɬ~ɮan no~u nijaro~uʡ ano~u əʦa no~u ʦikawasaj ko~u kaʦiʡiʦəɾ ħaw? ʦaajto~u! o~u ʦəʦaj no~u paso~uʡəɾinaj ɬ~ɮəŋan ʦəʦaj ko~u kawas ja sanaj a mito~uo~uraj, mataɾaw aʦa to~u "piʦəriŋ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw" a kawasan, ʦaaj piiŋir to~u kaɾiko~uwatan no~u iɾisin, to~una pakatəŋiɾ to~u kawas no~u iɾisin ʦaaj sato~u patərəp ko~u kamirmir, maaro~uʡaj no~u paɾafo~uaj ħakija? na taɾaʦo~uwaaj to~u ko~u nano~u nipaso~uʡəɾinan saw? o~u pito~uɾo~un no~u fo~uksi o~u sapifaɾiʦ aʦa to~u papo~utaɾ no~u iɾisin, nika ʦaaj kafaɾiʦ ko~u tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ i saɾaɾo~umaʡan no~u iɾisin. maso~uwaɾaj to~u ako~u: pitəkaan no~u ɾisin/paʡəɬ~ɮaw nai pipaɾo~umaan to~u ħapaj/ɾaməɾo~u, ʦaaj to~u pipaɾo~uma kita to~u ħafaj/ɾaməɾo~u i, nika miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ ħaʦa kita miɬ~ɮəmak to~u iɾisin; tajra to~u kita i to~ukaj, ʦaaj to~u kaɾio~umaħ, awaaj to~u piɾito~uɬ~ɮan, nika miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ ħo~u kita miɬ~ɮəmak to~u iɾisin; maɾiŋaɬ~ɮ kita i to~ukaj, ʦaaj ka ʦakat ko~u kinaira, nika miɬ~ɮəmak ħaʦa to~u iɾisin, nawħani o~u iɾisin ʦaaj to~u ko~u piħəmak to~u piɾito~uɬ~ɮan, o~u paħapinaŋ to~u piaħo~uwiɬ~ɮ/araj to~u kawas. o~u nano~u masamsamaj, mapaʡəkəɾaj no~u "paɾafo~uaj tatiiħaj" ko~u tato~uʡasan no~u ʡamis finaʦaɬ~ɮan, taɾaʦo~uwa misaʡiʦəɾ i masamaamaanaj to~u sapiɾijaŋ a miʦo~uʡaj, ʦimaɾasawaɬ~ɮajto~u ko~u ʡo~urip, ħato~u ʦaaj ka ɾifət ko~u mipaʡəkəɾaj. nano~uja ɬ~ɮəŋan to~u pitiʡər to~u siniʡaɬ~ɮa no~u kawas, paʡaraw to~u pakajraan a miɾijaŋ, itija a maɾo~uwiɬ~ɮ ko~u tatiiħaj, pakaɾijas to~u ko~u finawɾan to~u kataɾawan a ʦipako~uniraaj. maħaən to~u kita anini, itini i tatiiħaj a kaʡo~uripan, o~u miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦaj to~u piɬ~ɮipo~ut no~u kawas titaanan, saka ira kita i matini, o~urasaka pakajni to~unini ko~u sapiɬ~ɮəmak ita to~u iɾisin, o~u nian ko~u paħəʦian ato~u kaʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋan no~u "iɾisin" ħananaj. taɾaʦo~uwa mafaɾiʦ to~u ko~u papo~utaɾ no~u po~unka, nika saɾaɾo~umaʡan no~u po~unka ʦaajto~u kafaɾiʦ, o~u nian ko~uja mirəɬ~ɮo~uan no~u mita a tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ato~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan no~u po~unka. itini i kasanijaro~uʡaro~uʡ a finawɾan saħəto~u to~u o~u mito~uo~uraj to~u kristo~ukiw, tiŋso~ukiw, sinjaso~u ano~u əʦa ro~uma pakajraan, anini o~u to~uɾo~un ko~u pitəkaan no~u iɾisin o~u ŋaʡajaj, awaaj ko~u kafaɾiʦ no~u tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u iɾisin. nika ɬ~ɮəŋan o~u piɬ~ɮəmak no~u sifo~u ano~u əʦa siʦian tamɬ~ɮaw a niʦikəro~uħan a iɾisin ko~u so~uʡəɾinaj mafaɾiʦ, mawiɾətaj ko~u tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ saɾaɾo~umaʡan a iɾisin, nawħani matiniaj a iɾisin o~u sakiʡarawan, pikiki aʦa, piɾiətanan no~u makəro~uaj, ʦaajaj ko~u sakipiaħo~uwiɬ~ɮ/piaraj to~u kawas ko~u nikəro~uan. o~urasaka o~u kapaħ no~u ʡamis o~u mamiɾijaŋ to~u mikikiaj ko~u paħəʦian a iɾisin ko~u matato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj. mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj ʦi ʦiɾo~u siŋsi (****/*/*) ==== mifaɾiʦaj ʦi masao~u nikar ====
S.FORM: == O nengneng to ilisin (3) == Kailisinan ira ko "pakomodan". To'as ilisin no niyaro' no 'Amis i, ira ko masiikeday to pakomodan, pililafangan ato pipihayan. Sakacecay romi'ad to dadaya midemak to "pakomodan" a ilisin, ikor to pina romi'ad midemak to pililafang ato pipihayan. O tatenokan no ilisin ko "pililafangan", caay ka dengan o finawlan, halo o komodan a kawas ato lafang, malakapot a romadiw, makero, miepah, mi'icep, maainiini a matatawatawa, malipahak toya romi'ad. O "pipihayan" o kakomodan no niyaro' mifetir/mifetik, o fafahiyan no niyaro' ko romadiway a masakero (caay pikihatiya ko fa'inayan), misera to komodan a kawas ato lafalafang. O katadamaan no "pikomodan" matiya pidemak to "pisacepo'" a lisin, mateli i sapad ko toron, 'icep, fila' ato epah. Mi'inip ko kakomodan no niyaro' to epah, itiya pasifafaed micolipes, padoedo o kakomodan ato kakitaan no niyaro' romadiw to sapikomod a radiw, mihamham to piraod no kakomodan a kawas i kailisinan a demak. toya pikomodan dengan o fa'inayan ko malikowatay masakero, fafahiyan ato kaemangay miki'araw i lawac, nika caay ka nga'ay micomod i laloma', matefocaw no kawas. Caayay ka tadamaan a pikomodan, nika midemak ko kakomodan no niyaro' mifetir/mifetik itiya i, miceno' ko talodo' to epah, pasifafaed mifetir/mifetik manga'ay to. Nanoya kakomodan ato kakitaan no niyaro romadiw to sapikomod a radiw, mitahidang mihamham to komodan a kawas a mikihatiya to ilisin. "Pikomodan", so'elinen i o "palatadamaan a lisin", orasaka o sasowalen no 'Amis to ilisin, "itiniay i cilisinay", patodongan noni o pahanhanan no niyaro', micomod i "salaloma'an no tadamaanay no ilisin", o midoedo to nitelekan i lisin a ma'orip, midemak, sakaeca ka demak ko sakalatiih a cilafo. Paherek to ko ilisin, midemak ko kakomodan no niyaro' to "piihayan" a mifetir/mifetik, todong "piselong to tadamanay no lisin", o finawlan itini i "piselong to tadamaanay lisin", mapatiko tayra i ka'oripan to romi'ami'ad. Orasaka katimolay 'Amis (Posong) kiloma'an han ko ilisin, "Ilaloma'ay" sanay. Roma pahapinang to "laloma'anay a kadademak, caay ko kalingadan; nika ira ko talolongay harateng sakiilisin, micomod ko tamdaw i laloma' no "tadamaanay lisin a romi'ad". O maanan koya "tadamaanay lisin a romi'ad"? nawhani oya tadamaanay kawas mikihatiyaay to i salaloma'an no ilisin a demak, o tamdamdaw midoedo to lisin a demak. cimaay koya nitahidangan a kawas i kailisinan? Onini a kawakawas o sowal no 'Amis o kawas saan. I 1986 miheca Taywan sisyo yofayof pasadak to "O pidafohan to sowal no 'Amis" misaheci ti kawas: (1) Wama a kawas, (2)kawakawa, 'adingo/salo'afang, mitifacay to tataparan a iraay, (3)kawas/palafoay. So'elinen ko sowal masasifed ko harateng no 'Amis to saki kawas, nika manga'ay sasiikeden o "i saseraay kawas" ato "kakarayan a kawas" a tosa. O i saseraay a kawas, halo tekedan 'adingo, 'a'adopen 'adingo, malengaway 'adingo, milafoay 'adingo (tatiihay salo'afang, mirarakatay salo'afang), tofotofo, tekateka, lalooc kawas, maciwciw, 'orad, sara, lonen/'atoray. "kakarayan a kawas" halo malataw, cilocidal, folad, to'as a kawas (nga'ayay salo'afang, talakakarayan), kawas no cikawasay. Orasaka, "pakomodan" no ilisin, caay ko pitahidang to kawas no to'as a lisin, mitahidangay to ikakarayanay isaseraay a kawakawasan. Kahacecay laloma'an no 'Amis awaay ko "pakawasan", orasaka awaay ko pita'ong to to'asan a kaas a lisin. Ira ko papinapina kapah no 'Amis misalongoc to "pita'ongan to to'as" i kailisinan, kahinapecen ako ko matiniay, matiniay a "pikomodan" masaromotay ko kafana'anto "to'as a lisin"? ano eca mafiyolay to no Payrang to pipatireng to "pakawasan" hakiya? Itini "pipakomodan" ano eca i "pipihayan" to, mikomoday no niyaro' citodong to pifetir/pifetik, o todong no "salong no kacipinangan". Matiya o pihamham no miso to picomod no tao i loma' iso, paciro' to kamay (kawanan/kawili) a mikawih, todong no faloco' iso. Kacitodongan ko pikawih, pahapinang to pihamham no faloco'. O patodongan aca ko pikawih, nika awaay ko kaci'icel nira. Tatiih matira ko sowal iso: nawhani ira ko pikawih nira, saka mato ci'iecelay kako, comod comod sa toya a loma'. Ira ko matiniay a demak haw? Awaayto. Itini i kasasiromaroma no pitooran i, o todong no lisin o "salong no kacipinangan", pakayni toni a salong no kacipinangan, pahapinang no faloco' mangodo to saki kawas. Orasaka, o foksi ko mitolonay to pitekaan no ilisin i, oya caayay ko mitooray a tamdaw aka a kasomowal: Aya, macalap/ma'awid to no Kristokiw a Kawas konini, saka caayto ka pikihatiya tonini a ilisin. Malecad to, ano o mikomoday no niyaro' ko mifetiray/mifetikay to pitekaan no ilisin i, oya mitooray a tamdaw caayka pasowal: Aya, macalap/ma'awid to no cikawas palafoay konini, mapaoning to, saka caayto ka pikihatiya kako tonini a ilisin. Ano o ci'icelay ko pifetir/pifetik i, ciepocay koya mitahidangan a kawas i picomod i kailisinan hakiya? Pakayni i pipihayan misera a pifetir/pifetik ira ko "epoc"? o pikawih no tamdaw a micomod, oya pifahfah no tamdaw i sooy sa koya kawas, ano matira o tamdaw ko mi'emetay ari? O ningkiw no tamdaw matiya! O pifetir/pifetik no tamdamdaw, ikaka ko no kakomodan no niyaro' ano eca no cikawasay ko kaci'icel haw? Caayto! O cecay no paso'elinay dengan cecay ko Kawas ya sanay a mitooray, matalaw aca to "picering no tamdaw" a kawasan, caay piingir to kalikowatan no ilisin, tona pakatengil to kawas no ilisin caay sato paterep ko kamirmir, maaro'ay no palafoay hakiya? Na talacowaay to ko nano nipaso'elinan saw? O pitolon no foksi o sapifalic aca to papotal no ilisin, nika caay kafalic ko tatodong i salaloma'an no ilisin. Masowalay to ako: pitekaan no lisin/pa'edaw nai pipalomaan to hapay/lamelo, caay to pipaloma kita to hafay/lamelo i, nika midotoc haca kita midemak to ilisin; tayra to kita i tokay, caay to kaliomah, awaay to pilitodan, nika midotoc ho kita midemak to ilisin; malingad kita i tokay, caay ka cakat ko kinaira, nika midemak haca to ilisin, nawhani o ilisin caay to ko pihemak to pilitodan, o pahapinang to piahowid/aray to kawas. O nano masamsamay, mapa'ekelay no "palafoay tatiihay" ko tato'asan no 'Amis finacadan, talacowa misa'icel i masamaamaanay to sapiliyang a mico'ay, cimalasawadayto ko 'orip, hato caay ka lifet ko mipa'ekelay. Nanoya dengan to piti'er to sini'ada no kawas, pa'araw to pakayraan a miliyang, itiya a malowid ko tatiihay, pakaliyas to ko finawlan to katalawan a cipakoniraay. Mahaen to kita anini, itini i tatiihay a ka'oripan, o midotocay to pidipot no kawas titaanan, saka ira kita i matini, orasaka pakayni tonini ko sapidemak ita to ilisin, o nian ko pahecian ato kacitodongan no "Ilisin" hananay. Talacowa mafalic to ko papotal no ponka, nika salaloma'an no ponka caayto kafalic, o nian koya miredoan no mita a tatodong ato laloma'an no ponka. Itini i kasaniyaro'aro' a finawlan saheto to o mitooray to Kristokiw, Tingsokiw, Sinyaso ano eca roma pakayraan, anini o tolon ko pitekaan no ilisin o nga'ayay, awaay ko kafalic no tatodong no ilisin. Nika dengan o pidemak no sifo ano eca sician tamdaw a nicikerohan a ilisin ko so'elinay mafalic, mawiletay ko tatodong salaloma'an a ilisin, nawhani matiniay a ilisin o saki'arawan, pikiki aca, pilietanan no makeroay, caayay ko sakipiahowid/piaray to kawas ko nikeroan. Orasaka o kapah no 'Amis o mamiliyang to mikikiay ko pahecian a ilisin ko matatodongay. Mitiliday ci Cilo singsi (2018/8/1) ==== Mifalicay ci Masao Nikar ====
S.PHON: == o~u nəŋnəŋ to~u iɾisin (*) == kaiɾisinan ira ko~u "pako~umo~uɬ~ɮan". to~uʡas iɾisin no~u nijaro~uʡ no~u ʡamis i, ira ko~u masiikəɬ~ɮaj to~u pako~umo~uɬ~ɮan, piɾiɾafaŋan ato~u pipiħajan. sakaʦəʦaj ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ to~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaja miɬ~ɮəmak to~u "pako~umo~uɬ~ɮan" a iɾisin, iko~ur to~u pina ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ miɬ~ɮəmak to~u piɾiɾafaŋ ato~u pipiħajan. o~u tatəno~ukan no~u iɾisin ko~u "piɾiɾafaŋan", ʦaaj ka ɬ~ɮəŋan o~u finawɾan, ħaɾo~u o~u ko~umo~uɬ~ɮan a kawas ato~u ɾafaŋ, maɾakapo~ut a ro~umaɬ~ɮiw, makəro~u, miəpaħ, miʡiʦəp, maainiini a matatawatawa, maɾipaħak to~uja ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ. o~u "pipiħajan" o~u kako~umo~uɬ~ɮan no~u nijaro~uʡ mifətir/mifətik, o~u fafaħijan no~u nijaro~uʡ ko~u ro~umaɬ~ɮiwaj a masakəro~u (ʦaaj pikiħatija ko~u faʡinajan), misəra to~u ko~umo~uɬ~ɮan a kawas ato~u ɾafaɾafaŋ. o~u kataɬ~ɮamaan no~u "piko~umo~uɬ~ɮan" matija piɬ~ɮəmak to~u "pisaʦəpo~uʡ" a ɾisin, matəɾi i sapaɬ~ɮ ko~u to~uro~un, ʡiʦəp, fiɾaʡ ato~u əpaħ. miʡinip ko~u kako~umo~uɬ~ɮan no~u nijaro~uʡ to~u əpaħ, itija pasifafaəɬ~ɮ miʦo~uɾipəs, paɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u o~u kako~umo~uɬ~ɮan ato~u kakitaan no~u nijaro~uʡ ro~umaɬ~ɮiw to~u sapiko~umo~uɬ~ɮ a raɬ~ɮiw, miħamħam to~u pirao~uɬ~ɮ no~u kako~umo~uɬ~ɮan a kawas i kaiɾisinan a ɬ~ɮəmak. to~uja piko~umo~uɬ~ɮan ɬ~ɮəŋan o~u faʡinajan ko~u maɾiko~uwataj masakəro~u, fafaħijan ato~u kaəmaŋaj mikiʡaraw i ɾawaʦ, nika ʦaaj ka ŋaʡaj miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ i ɾaɾo~umaʡ, matəfo~uʦaw no~u kawas. ʦaajaj ka taɬ~ɮamaan a piko~umo~uɬ~ɮan, nika miɬ~ɮəmak ko~u kako~umo~uɬ~ɮan no~u nijaro~uʡ mifətir/mifətik itija i, miʦəno~uʡ ko~u taɾo~uɬ~ɮo~uʡ to~u əpaħ, pasifafaəɬ~ɮ mifətir/mifətik maŋaʡaj to~u. nano~uja kako~umo~uɬ~ɮan ato~u kakitaan no~u nijaro~u ro~umaɬ~ɮiw to~u sapiko~umo~uɬ~ɮ a raɬ~ɮiw, mitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ miħamħam to~u ko~umo~uɬ~ɮan a kawas a mikiħatija to~u iɾisin. "piko~umo~uɬ~ɮan", so~uʡəɾinən i o~u "paɾataɬ~ɮamaan a ɾisin", o~urasaka o~u saso~uwaɾən no~u ʡamis to~u iɾisin, "itiniaj i ʦiɾisinaj", pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋan no~uni o~u paħanħanan no~u nijaro~uʡ, miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ i "saɾaɾo~umaʡan no~u taɬ~ɮamaanaj no~u iɾisin", o~u miɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u to~u nitəɾəkan i ɾisin a maʡo~urip, miɬ~ɮəmak, sakaəʦa ka ɬ~ɮəmak ko~u sakaɾatiiħ a ʦiɾafo~u. paħərək to~u ko~u iɾisin, miɬ~ɮəmak ko~u kako~umo~uɬ~ɮan no~u nijaro~uʡ to~u "piiħajan" a mifətir/mifətik, to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ "pisəɾo~uŋ to~u taɬ~ɮamanaj no~u ɾisin", o~u finawɾan itini i "pisəɾo~uŋ to~u taɬ~ɮamaanaj ɾisin", mapatiko~u tajra i kaʡo~uripan to~u ro~umiʡamiʡaɬ~ɮ. o~urasaka katimo~uɾaj ʡamis (po~uso~uŋ) kiɾo~umaʡan ħan ko~u iɾisin, "iɾaɾo~umaʡaj" sanaj. ro~uma paħapinaŋ to~u "ɾaɾo~umaʡanaj a kaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmak, ʦaaj ko~u kaɾiŋaɬ~ɮan; nika ira ko~u taɾo~uɾo~uŋaj ħaratəŋ sakiiɾisin, miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw i ɾaɾo~umaʡ no~u "taɬ~ɮamaanaj ɾisin a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ". o~u maanan ko~uja "taɬ~ɮamaanaj ɾisin a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ"? nawħani o~uja taɬ~ɮamaanaj kawas mikiħatijaaj to~u i saɾaɾo~umaʡan no~u iɾisin a ɬ~ɮəmak, o~u tamɬ~ɮamɬ~ɮaw miɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u to~u ɾisin a ɬ~ɮəmak. ʦimaaj ko~uja nitaħiɬ~ɮaŋan a kawas i kaiɾisinan? o~unini a kawakawas o~u so~uwaɾ no~u ʡamis o~u kawas saan. i **** miħəʦa tajwan sisjo~u jo~ufajo~uf pasaɬ~ɮak to~u "o~u piɬ~ɮafo~uħan to~u so~uwaɾ no~u ʡamis" misaħəʦi ti kawas: (*) wama a kawas, (*)kawakawa, ʡaɬ~ɮiŋo~u/saɾo~uʡafaŋ, mitifaʦaj to~u tataparan a iraaj, (*)kawas/paɾafo~uaj. so~uʡəɾinən ko~u so~uwaɾ masasifəɬ~ɮ ko~u ħaratəŋ no~u ʡamis to~u saki kawas, nika maŋaʡaj sasiikəɬ~ɮən o~u "i sasəraaj kawas" ato~u "kakarajan a kawas" a to~usa. o~u i sasəraaj a kawas, ħaɾo~u təkəɬ~ɮan ʡaɬ~ɮiŋo~u, ʡaʡaɬ~ɮo~upən ʡaɬ~ɮiŋo~u, maɾəŋawaj ʡaɬ~ɮiŋo~u, miɾafo~uaj ʡaɬ~ɮiŋo~u (tatiiħaj saɾo~uʡafaŋ, mirarakataj saɾo~uʡafaŋ), to~ufo~uto~ufo~u, təkatəka, ɾaɾo~uo~uʦ kawas, maʦiwʦiw, ʡo~uraɬ~ɮ, sara, ɾo~unən/ʡato~uraj. "kakarajan a kawas" ħaɾo~u maɾataw, ʦiɾo~uʦiɬ~ɮaɾ, fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, to~uʡas a kawas (ŋaʡajaj saɾo~uʡafaŋ, taɾakakarajan), kawas no~u ʦikawasaj. o~urasaka, "pako~umo~uɬ~ɮan" no~u iɾisin, ʦaaj ko~u pitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ to~u kawas no~u to~uʡas a ɾisin, mitaħiɬ~ɮaŋaj to~u ikakarajanaj isasəraaj a kawakawasan. kaħaʦəʦaj ɾaɾo~umaʡan no~u ʡamis awaaj ko~u "pakawasan", o~urasaka awaaj ko~u pitaʡo~uŋ to~u to~uʡasan a kaas a ɾisin. ira ko~u papinapina kapaħ no~u ʡamis misaɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u "pitaʡo~uŋan to~u to~uʡas" i kaiɾisinan, kaħinapəʦən ako~u ko~u matiniaj, matiniaj a "piko~umo~uɬ~ɮan" masaro~umo~utaj ko~u kafanaʡanto~u "to~uʡas a ɾisin"? ano~u əʦa mafijo~uɾaj to~u no~u pajraŋ to~u pipatirəŋ to~u "pakawasan" ħakija? itini "pipako~umo~uɬ~ɮan" ano~u əʦa i "pipiħajan" to~u, miko~umo~uɬ~ɮaj no~u nijaro~uʡ ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u pifətir/pifətik, o~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u "saɾo~uŋ no~u kaʦipinaŋan". matija o~u piħamħam no~u miso~u to~u piʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ no~u tao~u i ɾo~umaʡ iso~u, paʦiro~uʡ to~u kamaj (kawanan/kawiɾi) a mikawiħ, to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ iso~u. kaʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋan ko~u pikawiħ, paħapinaŋ to~u piħamħam no~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ. o~u pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋan aʦa ko~u pikawiħ, nika awaaj ko~u kaʦiʡiʦəɾ nira. tatiiħ matira ko~u so~uwaɾ iso~u: nawħani ira ko~u pikawiħ nira, saka mato~u ʦiʡiəʦəɾaj kako~u, ʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ ʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ sa to~uja a ɾo~umaʡ. ira ko~u matiniaj a ɬ~ɮəmak ħaw? awaajto~u. itini i kasasiro~umaro~uma no~u pito~uo~uran i, o~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u ɾisin o~u "saɾo~uŋ no~u kaʦipinaŋan", pakajni to~uni a saɾo~uŋ no~u kaʦipinaŋan, paħapinaŋ no~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ maŋo~uɬ~ɮo~u to~u saki kawas. o~urasaka, o~u fo~uksi ko~u mito~uɾo~unaj to~u pitəkaan no~u iɾisin i, o~uja ʦaajaj ko~u mito~uo~uraj a tamɬ~ɮaw aka a kaso~umo~uwaɾ: aja, maʦaɾap/maʡawiɬ~ɮ to~u no~u kristo~ukiw a kawas ko~unini, saka ʦaajto~u ka pikiħatija to~unini a iɾisin. maɾəʦaɬ~ɮ to~u, ano~u o~u miko~umo~uɬ~ɮaj no~u nijaro~uʡ ko~u mifətiraj/mifətikaj to~u pitəkaan no~u iɾisin i, o~uja mito~uo~uraj a tamɬ~ɮaw ʦaajka paso~uwaɾ: aja, maʦaɾap/maʡawiɬ~ɮ to~u no~u ʦikawas paɾafo~uaj ko~unini, mapao~uniŋ to~u, saka ʦaajto~u ka pikiħatija kako~u to~unini a iɾisin. ano~u o~u ʦiʡiʦəɾaj ko~u pifətir/pifətik i, ʦiəpo~uʦaj ko~uja mitaħiɬ~ɮaŋan a kawas i piʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ i kaiɾisinan ħakija? pakajni i pipiħajan misəra a pifətir/pifətik ira ko~u "əpo~uʦ"? o~u pikawiħ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw a miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ, o~uja pifaħfaħ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw i so~uo~uj sa ko~uja kawas, ano~u matira o~u tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u miʡəmətaj ari? o~u niŋkiw no~u tamɬ~ɮaw matija! o~u pifətir/pifətik no~u tamɬ~ɮamɬ~ɮaw, ikaka ko~u no~u kako~umo~uɬ~ɮan no~u nijaro~uʡ ano~u əʦa no~u ʦikawasaj ko~u kaʦiʡiʦəɾ ħaw? ʦaajto~u! o~u ʦəʦaj no~u paso~uʡəɾinaj ɬ~ɮəŋan ʦəʦaj ko~u kawas ja sanaj a mito~uo~uraj, mataɾaw aʦa to~u "piʦəriŋ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw" a kawasan, ʦaaj piiŋir to~u kaɾiko~uwatan no~u iɾisin, to~una pakatəŋiɾ to~u kawas no~u iɾisin ʦaaj sato~u patərəp ko~u kamirmir, maaro~uʡaj no~u paɾafo~uaj ħakija? na taɾaʦo~uwaaj to~u ko~u nano~u nipaso~uʡəɾinan saw? o~u pito~uɾo~un no~u fo~uksi o~u sapifaɾiʦ aʦa to~u papo~utaɾ no~u iɾisin, nika ʦaaj kafaɾiʦ ko~u tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ i saɾaɾo~umaʡan no~u iɾisin. maso~uwaɾaj to~u ako~u: pitəkaan no~u ɾisin/paʡəɬ~ɮaw nai pipaɾo~umaan to~u ħapaj/ɾaməɾo~u, ʦaaj to~u pipaɾo~uma kita to~u ħafaj/ɾaməɾo~u i, nika miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ ħaʦa kita miɬ~ɮəmak to~u iɾisin; tajra to~u kita i to~ukaj, ʦaaj to~u kaɾio~umaħ, awaaj to~u piɾito~uɬ~ɮan, nika miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ ħo~u kita miɬ~ɮəmak to~u iɾisin; maɾiŋaɬ~ɮ kita i to~ukaj, ʦaaj ka ʦakat ko~u kinaira, nika miɬ~ɮəmak ħaʦa to~u iɾisin, nawħani o~u iɾisin ʦaaj to~u ko~u piħəmak to~u piɾito~uɬ~ɮan, o~u paħapinaŋ to~u piaħo~uwiɬ~ɮ/araj to~u kawas. o~u nano~u masamsamaj, mapaʡəkəɾaj no~u "paɾafo~uaj tatiiħaj" ko~u tato~uʡasan no~u ʡamis finaʦaɬ~ɮan, taɾaʦo~uwa misaʡiʦəɾ i masamaamaanaj to~u sapiɾijaŋ a miʦo~uʡaj, ʦimaɾasawaɬ~ɮajto~u ko~u ʡo~urip, ħato~u ʦaaj ka ɾifət ko~u mipaʡəkəɾaj. nano~uja ɬ~ɮəŋan to~u pitiʡər to~u siniʡaɬ~ɮa no~u kawas, paʡaraw to~u pakajraan a miɾijaŋ, itija a maɾo~uwiɬ~ɮ ko~u tatiiħaj, pakaɾijas to~u ko~u finawɾan to~u kataɾawan a ʦipako~uniraaj. maħaən to~u kita anini, itini i tatiiħaj a kaʡo~uripan, o~u miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦaj to~u piɬ~ɮipo~ut no~u kawas titaanan, saka ira kita i matini, o~urasaka pakajni to~unini ko~u sapiɬ~ɮəmak ita to~u iɾisin, o~u nian ko~u paħəʦian ato~u kaʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋan no~u "iɾisin" ħananaj. taɾaʦo~uwa mafaɾiʦ to~u ko~u papo~utaɾ no~u po~unka, nika saɾaɾo~umaʡan no~u po~unka ʦaajto~u kafaɾiʦ, o~u nian ko~uja mirəɬ~ɮo~uan no~u mita a tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ato~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan no~u po~unka. itini i kasanijaro~uʡaro~uʡ a finawɾan saħəto~u to~u o~u mito~uo~uraj to~u kristo~ukiw, tiŋso~ukiw, sinjaso~u ano~u əʦa ro~uma pakajraan, anini o~u to~uɾo~un ko~u pitəkaan no~u iɾisin o~u ŋaʡajaj, awaaj ko~u kafaɾiʦ no~u tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u iɾisin. nika ɬ~ɮəŋan o~u piɬ~ɮəmak no~u sifo~u ano~u əʦa siʦian tamɬ~ɮaw a niʦikəro~uħan a iɾisin ko~u so~uʡəɾinaj mafaɾiʦ, mawiɾətaj ko~u tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ saɾaɾo~umaʡan a iɾisin, nawħani matiniaj a iɾisin o~u sakiʡarawan, pikiki aʦa, piɾiətanan no~u makəro~uaj, ʦaajaj ko~u sakipiaħo~uwiɬ~ɮ/piaraj to~u kawas ko~u nikəro~uan. o~urasaka o~u kapaħ no~u ʡamis o~u mamiɾijaŋ to~u mikikiaj ko~u paħəʦian a iɾisin ko~u matato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj. mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj ʦi ʦiɾo~u siŋsi (****/*/*) ==== mifaɾiʦaj ʦi masao~u nikar ====
